title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
description: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for L. Frank Baum's The Wonderful Wizard of Oz

memes.label: "Uncopyright"
memes.description: "Uncopyright"

memes.label: Attack of the Fighting Trees
memes.description: At the edge of the great forest, living trees reach down with their branches to seize and throw back the travelers, forcing the Tin Woodman to chop their way through

memes.label: Attack of the Wild Crows
memes.description: The Wicked Witch of the West sends her flock of wild crows to destroy Dorothy's companions after the wolves fail; the Scarecrow defeats them all.

memes.label: Attack of the Wolves
memes.description: The Wicked Witch of the West sends a pack of wolves to kill Dorothy and her companions; the Tin Woodman defeats them all with his axe.
aliases: the wicked witch sends the wolves

memes.label: Aunt Em
memes.description: Dorothy's aunt and guardian on the gray Kansas prairie — the person Dorothy most wishes to return to, and the emotional anchor that gives the entire journey its purpose

memes.label: The Ball of Fire
memes.description: "The third form assumed by the Wizard of Oz—a blazing Ball of Fire—used to intimidate the Cowardly Lion during his audience with the Wizard."

memes.label: The Beast Form
memes.description: "The second form assumed by the Wizard of Oz—a monstrous Beast—used to intimidate the Tin Woodman during his audience."

memes.label: Black Bees
memes.description: A swarm of black bees summoned by the Wicked Witch of the West as her third attack wave against Dorothy and her companions, destroyed when their stings broke against the Tin Woodman's metal body.

memes.label: Boq
memes.description: A wealthy Munchkin who hosts Dorothy on her first night in the Land of Oz and advises her about the journey to the Emerald City

memes.label: Boq's House
memes.description: The round blue house of Boq, the richest Munchkin in the eastern land, where Dorothy spends her first night in the Land of Oz after the cyclone.

memes.label: Brain
memes.description: The quality the Scarecrow seeks — intelligence and the ability to think, which he believes will make him as good as any man

memes.label: China Country
memes.description: A dainty, miniature land in the southern region of Oz where everything — people, animals, and buildings — is made of fragile china.

memes.label: China People
memes.description: A community of tiny porcelain figures — people, animals, and buildings — who live in a fragile, walled country beyond the Dark Forest, terrified of being broken by outsiders

memes.label: Concepts
memes.description: A comprehensive index of all concept pages in the Wonderful Wizard of Oz wiki, including magical items, species, abstract ideas, and thematic elements.

relations.label: Kiss of the Witch of the North

memes.label: Cornfield
memes.description: A great cornfield in Munchkin Country where the Scarecrow was mounted on a pole to frighten away birds before Dorothy freed him to join her journey.

memes.label: Council of Munchkins
memes.description: The assembly of Munchkin elders and officials who gather to welcome Dorothy after the Wicked Witch of the East is crushed, and deliberate on how to honor and assist her

memes.label: Courage
memes.description: The quality the Cowardly Lion seeks — the absence of fear and the willingness to face danger, which he believes will make him the King of Beasts

memes.label: Cowardly Lion
memes.description: A lion who, despite being a natural king of beasts, is paralyzed by fear and joins Dorothy's journey seeking courage from the Wizard of Oz

memes.label: Crossing the Great Ditch
memes.description: The travelers encounter a wide chasm across the road of yellow brick; the Lion volunteers to leap across, carrying each companion on his back one at a time

memes.label: Cyclone Cellar
memes.description: The underground shelter at Uncle Henry's Kansas farm, a small dark hole reached by a trap door and ladder, where the family took refuge from cyclones.

memes.label: Dainty China Country
memes.description: A delicate land populated by tiny porcelain figures who live in fear of being broken by outsiders, encountered by Dorothy on her journey south to see Glinda
aliases: the Country of the China People

memes.label: Dark Forest
memes.description: The dense, shadowy forest through which the yellow brick road passes, home to the monstrous Kalidahs and later to the great beasts who crown the Cowardly Lion as their king

memes.label: Deadly Poppy Field
memes.description: A vast field of scarlet poppies whose narcotic fragrance causes all living creatures to fall into a deathlike sleep, nearly claiming the Cowardly Lion and Dorothy

memes.label: Death of the Wicked Witch of the East
memes.description: The moment Dorothy's falling house crushes the Wicked Witch of the East, ending her tyranny over the Munchkins and setting the entire adventure in motion
aliases: Death of the Wicked Witch of the East

memes.label: Deception
memes.description: The theme of illusion and deception in The Wonderful Wizard of Oz, most powerfully embodied by the Wizard himself, who rules through manufactured fear rather than genuine power.

memes.label: Discovery of Oz the Terrible
memes.description: Toto pulls aside a green screen in the Wizard's Throne Room to reveal the great and terrible Wizard of Oz as an ordinary old man from Omaha, exposing the grand deception at the heart of the Emerald City and transforming the story's understanding of power and belief

memes.label: Dorothy Enslaved
memes.description: Dorothy's period of enslavement in the Wicked Witch of the West's castle, where she was forced to work in the kitchen while the Witch plotted to steal the Silver Shoes.

memes.label: Dorothy Gale
memes.description: A young orphan girl from the gray Kansas prairies who is swept to the Land of Oz by a cyclone and must journey to the Emerald City to find her way home, becoming one of the most iconic child protagonists in American literature

memes.label: Emerald City
memes.description: The magnificent green capital of the Land of Oz where the Wizard resides, entered only through locked green spectacles that transform everything the visitor sees into emerald brilliance — an ingenious illusion of collective belief

memes.label: Emerald City Citizens
memes.description: "The inhabitants of the Emerald City, distinguished by their green clothing, greenish skin, and the locked green spectacles they all must wear."
aliases: the people of the Emerald City

memes.label: Emerald City Gates
memes.description: The entrance to the Emerald City, guarded by the Guardian of the Gates, where all visitors must don locked green spectacles before entering.
aliases: the gates of the Emerald City

memes.label: Emerald City Guard
memes.description: The soldier with the green whiskers who serves as the gatekeeper of the Emerald City, admitting visitors and maintaining order at the Wizard's command

memes.label: The Enchantment of the Tin Woodman
memes.description: "The backstory of how the Wicked Witch of the East enchanted a woodchopper's axe, causing it to sever his limbs one by one until he was replaced entirely with tin—and lost his heart."

memes.label: Escape from the Kalidahs
memes.description: Pursued by the monstrous Kalidahs, the Tin Woodman chops down a tree spanning a second ditch, allowing the group to cross — then the tree falls, plunging the Kalidahs into the chasm

memes.label: Events
memes.description: A comprehensive index of all event pages in the Wonderful Wizard of Oz wiki, covering key narrative events in chronological order from the Kansas cyclone to Dorothy's return home.

relations.label: Death of the Wicked Witch of the East
The Silver Shoes Carry Dorothy Home
Rescue from the Deadly Poppy Field
Trial of the Guardian of the Gates
Melting of the Wicked Witch of the West
The Lion Slays the Giant Spider

memes.label: Fear
memes.description: The emotion that defines the Cowardly Lion — the terror that makes his heart beat fast in danger, and the quality he seeks to overcome through courage

memes.label: Field Mice of Oz
memes.description: A community of intelligent, speaking field mice ruled by their diminutive Queen, who twice come to the aid of Dorothy and her companions

memes.label: Fighting Trees
memes.description: Animated trees that guard the entrance to the forest on the way to the Quadling Country, attacking travelers with their branches.

memes.label: Friendship
memes.description: The central thematic bond between Dorothy and her three companions that sustains their journey through the Land of Oz.

memes.label: Gayelette
memes.description: A beautiful and powerful sorceress princess of the North who created the Golden Cap and bound the Winged Monkeys to its commands.

memes.label: Glinda the Good Witch
memes.description: This page has been merged into [[glinda-the-good-witch]] — the Good Witch of the South.

memes.label: Glinda the Good Witch
memes.description: The beautiful and kind Good Witch of the South who rules the Quadlings and helps Dorothy return to Kansas.
aliases: the Good Witch of the South

memes.label: Glinda's Palace
memes.description: The ruby-adorned castle of Glinda the Good Witch, located at the southern edge of the Land of Oz on the border of the Deadly Desert.

memes.label: Golden Cap
memes.description: A magical golden cap with a circle of diamonds and rubies that grants its wearer three commands over the Winged Monkeys, passing from Quelala to the Wicked Witch to Dorothy to Glinda before freeing its servants forever

memes.label: Granting of the Wishes
memes.description: After being revealed as a humbug, the Wizard gives the Scarecrow a brain of bran and pins, the Tin Woodman a sawdust-stuffed silk heart, and the Lion a green liquid courage — fulfilling their deepest desires through symbolism and belief

memes.label: The Great Head
memes.description: "The first form assumed by the Wizard of Oz—a giant disembodied Head floating in the Throne Room—used to awe Dorothy and establish his fearsome reputation."

memes.label: The Great Spider
memes.description: "A monstrous spider-like creature terrorizing the forest animals, slain by the Cowardly Lion in a display of the courage he claimed not to possess."
aliases: the giant spider of the forest

memes.label: Green Spectacles
memes.description: Magical green-lensed spectacles required for entry into the Emerald City, which make everything appear green and sustain the illusion of the city's emerald nature

memes.label: Guardian of the Gates
memes.description: This page has been merged into [[guardian-of-the-gates]].

memes.label: Guardian of the Gates
memes.description: The green-whiskered soldier who guards the entrance to the Emerald City, fits visitors with locked green spectacles, and escorts them to the Palace of Oz

memes.label: Hammer-Head Hill
memes.description: A steep hill inhabited by armless, hammer-headed creatures who attack travelers by shooting their heads from their necks on spring-like cords, blocking the path to Glinda's palace

memes.label: Hammer-Heads
memes.description: A hostile race of armless, flat-headed humanoids whose necks extend like springs, allowing them to launch their hard heads as battering weapons against anyone attempting to climb their hill

memes.label: Heart
memes.description: The quality the Tin Woodman seeks above all else — the capacity to love, which he values more than intelligence

memes.label: Home
memes.description: Dorothy's deepest desire — to return to Kansas and Aunt Em, the driving motivation of her entire journey through Oz

memes.label: Hope
memes.description: The sustaining emotion that keeps the travelers moving forward on the Yellow Brick Road, even when the Wizard's promises seem impossible

memes.label: Kalidah Pack
memes.description: The predatory pack of Kalidahs that hunts in the Dark Forest, operating as a coordinated hunting group that stalks travelers on the road of yellow brick

memes.label: Kalidahs
memes.description: Fearsome beasts with the body of a bear and the head of a tiger that inhabit the dark forests of Oz and prey upon unwary travelers

memes.label: Kansas
memes.description: Dorothy's home state — a gray, sun-scorched prairie that stands in stark contrast to the colorful Land of Oz and represents the ordinary world from which Dorothy is transported and to which she spends the entire story trying to return

memes.label: The Kansas Cyclone
memes.description: A powerful tornado that lifts Dorothy's Kansas farmhouse with her and Toto inside, carrying them across the deadlands and depositing them in the Land of Oz — the inciting incident that launches one of the most famous journeys in children's literature

relations.label: Death of the Wicked Witch of the East

memes.label: The Killing of the Wildcat
memes.description: "The Tin Woodman kills a great yellow Wildcat chasing the Queen of the Field Mice, an act of compassion that earns him the eternal gratitude of the mouse kingdom."
aliases: the Tin Woodman saves the Queen of the Field Mice

memes.label: Kindness
memes.description: The recurring virtue in Oz — the kindness shown by strangers to Dorothy, by the Witch of the North, by Glinda, and by the companions to each other, which makes the journey possible

memes.label: King of Beasts
memes.description: The title traditionally ascribed to the Lion, which the Cowardly Lion sought to earn through genuine courage, ultimately achieving it by slaying the Giant Spider and being crowned King of the Forest.

memes.label: Kiss of the Witch of the North
memes.description: A magical protective charm bestowed by the Good Witch of the North upon Dorothy, protecting her from all harm in the Land of Oz

memes.label: Land of Oz
memes.description: The magical fairy country surrounded by an impassable desert, divided into four color-coded quadrants ruled by witches, where Dorothy's adventures take place

memes.label: Liberation of the Winkies
memes.description: Following the Wicked Witch's melting, the Winkies celebrate their freedom and, at their own request, accept the Tin Woodman as their new ruler, with promises to serve him faithfully

relations.label: Melting Of The Wicked Witch Of The West

memes.label: The Lion Slays the Giant Spider
memes.description: The Cowardly Lion kills a monstrous spider that terrorizes the beasts of the southern forest, proving his courage and winning their fealty as their new King
aliases: The Lion Slays the Giant Spider

memes.label: Love
memes.description: The emotion the Tin Woodman lost when his heart was taken — romantic love for a Munchkin maiden, the most human of all feelings

memes.label: The Making of the Scarecrow
memes.description: "The backstory of how a Munchkin farmer created the Scarecrow, painting his features from a sack of straw and setting him on a pole in the cornfield."

memes.label: Dorothy Meets Glinda
memes.description: After a perilous journey south, Dorothy finally reaches Glinda's palace in Quadling Country to ask the Good Witch how she can return home to Kansas

memes.label: Melting of the Wicked Witch of the West
memes.description: In a desperate act of self-defense, Dorothy throws a bucket of water over the Wicked Witch of the West, causing the witch to melt and freeing the Winkies from slavery
aliases: Melting of the Wicked Witch of the West

memes.label: Munchkin Country
memes.description: The eastern quadrant of the Land of Oz, inhabited by the Munchkins who wear blue and were freed from the Wicked Witch of the East by Dorothy's falling house

relations.label: Kiss of the Witch of the North

memes.label: Munchkin Farmers
memes.description: The agricultural communities of Munchkin Country who work the blue-tinted fields and were freed from the Wicked Witch of the East's oppression when Dorothy's house landed on her

memes.label: The Munchkin Maiden
memes.description: A beautiful Munchkin girl beloved by the Tin Woodman before his transformation, who waits for his promised return.

memes.label: Munchkins
memes.description: The inhabitants of the eastern land of Oz, the Munchkins are a peaceful, blue-clad farming people who were freed from the Wicked Witch of the East's bondage by Dorothy Gale's arrival

memes.label: The Tin Woodman's Oilcan
memes.description: "The oilcan used by the Tin Woodman to prevent his tin joints from rusting, kept by Dorothy in her basket during their journey."

memes.label: Organizations
memes.description: A comprehensive index of all organization and group pages in the Wonderful Wizard of Oz wiki, covering the peoples, bands, councils, and collectives of the Land of Oz.

memes.label: Court of Oz
memes.description: The assembly of ladies, gentlemen, and attendants who populate the Wizard's palace in the Emerald City, participating in a grand illusion of royal ceremony

memes.label: Palace of Oz
memes.description: The grand green palace at the heart of the Emerald City where the Wizard holds court in multiple illusory forms and the travelers finally discover the truth behind the curtain

memes.label: Persons
memes.description: All characters appearing in The Wonderful Wizard of Oz, sorted by most referenced.

memes.label: Places
memes.description: All locations in The Wonderful Wizard of Oz, grouped by region.

memes.label: Poppy Field
memes.description: A vast meadow of scarlet poppies whose powerful fragrance causes anyone who breathes it to fall into a deadly, eternal sleep.

memes.label: Quadling Country
memes.description: The southern quadrant of the Land of Oz, ruled by Glinda the Good Witch and associated with the color red, where Dorothy finally learns the secret of the Silver Shoes

memes.label: Quadling Farmers
memes.description: The peaceful rural communities of Quadling Country who live under Glinda's protection in the red quadrant of southern Oz

memes.label: Quadlings
memes.description: The inhabitants of the southern land of Oz, the Quadlings are a rich, happy people clad in red, ruled by the benevolent Glinda the Good Witch, and noted for their striking round heads and good humor

memes.label: Queen of the Field Mice
memes.description: The dignified ruler of the field mice who mobilizes her thousands of subjects to rescue the Cowardly Lion from the deadly poppy field

memes.label: Quelala
memes.description: The betrothed of Princess Gayelette, said to be the best and wisest man in all the land, and the first owner of the Golden Cap.

memes.label: Rescue from the Deadly Poppy Field
memes.description: Dorothy, Toto, and the Cowardly Lion fall into a deathlike sleep amid the narcotic poppies; the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman carry Dorothy out while the Queen of the Field Mice and her subjects pull the Lion to safety
aliases: Rescue from the Deadly Poppy Field

memes.label: Restoration of the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman
memes.description: After the Winged Monkeys destroyed the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman, the grateful Winkies find, repair, and restore both companions to wholeness.

memes.label: Road of Yellow Brick
memes.description: The enchanted road paved with yellow bricks that connects Munchkin Country to the Emerald City, serving as the physical and symbolic path of Dorothy's quest

memes.label: Ruby Palace
memes.description: The handsome ruby-block palace of the beautiful princess and sorceress Gayelette in the northern land of Oz, site of the event that bound the Winged Monkeys to the Golden Cap.

memes.label: Scarecrow
memes.description: A scarecrow made of straw who joins Dorothy's journey seeking brains from the Wizard of Oz, despite already being the most intelligent and ingenious problem-solver of the group

memes.label: Self-Discovery
memes.description: The journey of self-discovery undertaken by each of Dorothy's companions, who learn that the qualities they seek externally have always existed within themselves.

memes.label: Silver Shoes
memes.description: Enchanted silver shoes taken from the Wicked Witch of the East that grant the wearer the power to travel anywhere in three steps — the very power that could have returned Dorothy to Kansas from her first day in Oz, had she only known

memes.label: Silver Whistle
memes.description: "Magical whistle worn by the Wicked Witch of the West to summon wolves, wild crows, and black bees with one, two, or three blasts."

memes.label: The Soldier with the Green Whiskers
memes.description: The green-uniformed guard stationed before the Palace of Oz, distinguishable by his long green beard.

memes.label: Stork
memes.description: A helpful stork who rescues the Scarecrow from the river when he is stranded on his pole in the water

memes.label: The Wizard's Balloon
memes.description: "A hot-air balloon constructed by the Wizard of Oz from green silk to carry himself and Dorothy back across the desert to Kansas."

memes.label: The Beasts of the Forest
memes.description: The assembly of hundreds of wild beasts who gather to seek protection from a monstrous spider, and upon the Lion's victory, crown him as their King

memes.label: The Beautiful Green Girl
memes.description: A young woman who attends to visitors in the Palace of Oz, guiding them to their rooms and relaying messages to the Wizard.

memes.label: Captain of the Guard
memes.description: The officer who commands the Emerald City guard, responsible for the city's defense and the maintenance of order in the green capital

memes.label: The China Clown (Mr. Joker)
memes.description: A jolly china clown figurine in the Dainty China Country, cracked from repeatedly standing on his head, who greets Dorothy with a teasing rhyme.

memes.label: The China Princess
memes.description: The delicate porcelain ruler of the Dainty China Country who refuses to let the Cowardly Lion cross her land for fear he will break her people
aliases: the Princess of the Dainty China Country

memes.label: The Cowardly Lion Joins the Party
memes.description: The encounter in the forest where the Cowardly Lion attacks the travelers, is confronted by Dorothy, and ultimately joins their quest to see the Wizard of Oz.

memes.label: The Cyclone
memes.description: The great cyclone that transports Dorothy and her house from Kansas to the Land of Oz

memes.label: The Deadly Desert
memes.description: The vast, impassable desert that surrounds the Land of Oz on all sides, separating it from the outside world and making escape or invasion impossible by ordinary means.

memes.label: The Enchanted Axe
memes.description: The axe enchanted by the Wicked Witch of the East that systematically dismembered the young woodchopper, leading to his transformation into the Tin Woodman.

memes.label: The Forest of Wild Beasts
memes.description: The ancient forest in the southern part of Oz inhabited by a community of wild beasts who were terrorized by a giant spider until the Cowardly Lion slew it and became their king.

memes.label: The Four Witches of Oz
memes.description: The quartet of sorceresses who once held dominion over the four quadrants of the Land of Oz — the Wicked Witches of the East and West and the Good Witches of the North and South — whose shifting balance of power shapes the entire story

relations.label: Glinda the Good Witch of the South
death of the Witch of the East
death of the Witch of the West

memes.label: The Golden Cap Summons
memes.description: The Wicked Witch of the West uses the Golden Cap to summon the Winged Monkeys, who capture Dorothy and the Cowardly Lion and destroy the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman.
aliases: the wicked witch summons the winged monkeys
the golden caps first use against dorothy

relations.label: kiss of the Witch of the North

memes.label: The Great Ditch
memes.description: A wide ravine that splits the road of yellow brick, forcing Dorothy and her companions to devise a dangerous crossing as their first major physical obstacle

memes.label: The Great Forest
memes.description: A vast and dangerous woodland in the Land of Oz through which Dorothy and her companions must travel, home to the Kalidahs, the Cowardly Lion, and the deadly poppy field.

memes.label: The Journey to the South
memes.description: The companions' journey southward through the Quadling Country to find Glinda the Good Witch, facing the Fighting Trees, the China Country, and the Hammer-Heads along the way.

memes.label: King of the Winged Monkeys
memes.description: The dignified ruler of the Winged Monkey Band, bound by the Golden Cap's enchantment to serve its owner, who narrates his people's tragic history to Dorothy

memes.label: The Lazy Old Woman
memes.description: The lazy Munchkin guardian of the Munchkin Maiden who conspired with the Wicked Witch of the East to prevent the young woodchopper's marriage.

memes.label: The Old Crow
memes.description: An old crow who taunts the Scarecrow about his lack of brains but inadvertently gives him the ambition that sets him on the path to wisdom

memes.label: The Silver Shoes Carry Dorothy Home
memes.description: "Glinda reveals the power of the Silver Shoes — three clicks of the heels will carry the wearer anywhere — and Dorothy bids farewell to her companions and flies back to Kansas"
aliases: The Silver Shoes Carry Dorothy Home

memes.label: Soldier with the Green Whiskers
memes.description: A soldier of the Emerald City whose whiskers grow so long and green that they reach his knees, who guards the door of the Palace of Oz and acts as the Wizard's attendant

relations.label: Wizard is exposed as a humbug

memes.label: The Tinsmith
memes.description: The Munchkin tinsmith who crafted replacement limbs and body parts for the Tin Woodman after each enchanted-axe injury.

memes.label: The Winkie Goldsmith
memes.description: The Winkie goldsmith who crafted a solid gold axe-handle for the Tin Woodman after the Winkie tinsmiths repaired his damaged body.

memes.label: The Witch Steals the Silver Shoe
memes.description: The Wicked Witch of the West's successful trick to steal one of Dorothy's Silver Shoes, which provoked Dorothy to throw water on the Witch and cause her death.
aliases: the theft of the silver shoe

memes.label: The Wizard Is Exposed
memes.description: The moment when Toto accidentally reveals the true identity of the Wizard of Oz as an ordinary man operating machinery behind a screen.

memes.label: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
memes.description: "The first Oz book by L. Frank Baum, published in 1900, telling the story of Dorothy Gale's adventures in the Land of Oz."

memes.label: Throne Room
memes.description: The grand chamber in the Palace of Oz where the Wizard receives visitors, appearing in multiple shifting forms depending on who enters.
aliases: the Throne Room of the Great Oz

memes.label: Tin Woodman
memes.description: A woodman made entirely of tin who joins Dorothy's journey seeking a heart from the Wizard of Oz, though he already has more compassion than anyone

memes.label: Tin Woodman's Cottage
memes.description: The log-and-branch cottage in the Munchkin forest where the Tin Woodman lived as a woodchopper and later stood rusted for a year before being rescued by Dorothy.

memes.label: Toto
memes.description: Dorothy's little black dog, her constant companion whose curiosity and courage repeatedly change the course of events in Oz

memes.label: Transformation
memes.description: The recurring motif of physical and psychological transformation that defines the journeys of the Tin Woodman, the Scarecrow, and the Cowardly Lion as they become what they always were.

memes.label: Trial of the Guardian of the Gates
memes.description: The travelers must persuade the Guardian of the Gates to allow them entry into the Emerald City; they succeed and are fitted with green-lensed spectacles locked onto their heads
aliases: Trial of the Guardian of the Gates

memes.label: Uncle Henry
memes.description: Dorothy's uncle and guardian on the Kansas prairie, a hardworking farmer worn gray by years of labor and worry

memes.label: Uncle Henry's Farm
memes.description: The gray, one-room farmhouse on the Kansas prairie where Dorothy lives with Uncle Henry and Aunt Em — the starting and ending point of her journey to the Land of Oz.

memes.label: Wicked Witch of the East
memes.description: The evil sorceress who ruled the Munchkins until Dorothy's falling house killed her, setting the entire story in motion and leaving behind the enchanted Silver Shoes
aliases: the Wicked Witch of the East

memes.label: Wicked Witch of the West
memes.description: The main antagonist of the story — the last remaining Wicked Witch in Oz, who rules the Winkies with cruelty and fears nothing except water and the charm of the Silver Shoes

memes.label: Wicked Witch's Enslaved Winkies
memes.description: The Winkies forced into servitude by the Wicked Witch of the West who were liberated when Dorothy melted the witch with a bucket of water

memes.label: Winkie Country
memes.description: This page has been merged into [[winkie-country]] — the western region of the Land of Oz.

memes.label: Wild Crows
memes.description: A flock of forty wild crows summoned by the Wicked Witch of the West as her second wave of attack against Dorothy and her companions, all slain by the Scarecrow.

memes.label: Wildcat
memes.description: A great yellow wildcat that chased the Queen of the Field Mice and was slain by the Tin Woodman, an act of kindness that earned the travelers the loyalty of the field mice.

memes.label: Winged Monkey Band
memes.description: The organized band of flying monkeys bound by a magical enchantment to serve the owner of the Golden Cap, commanded by their unnamed King, who must obey exactly three commands per owner before the spell passes — ultimately freed by Glinda

memes.label: Winged Monkeys
memes.description: A band of intelligent flying monkeys bound by enchantment to obey the wearer of the Golden Cap, who perform three commands for each owner

memes.label: Winkie Country
memes.description: The western quadrant of the Land of Oz, home to the Winkies and formerly ruled by the Wicked Witch of the West until Dorothy melted her

memes.label: Winkie Tinsmiths
memes.description: The skilled Winkie craftsmen who originally built the Tin Woodman and, after the Witch's death, create the ornamental gifts — including a new oil-can — presented to Dorothy's companions

memes.label: Winkies
memes.description: The inhabitants of the western land of Oz, the Winkies are a peaceful but not brave people, clad in yellow, who were enslaved by the Wicked Witch of the West until freed by Dorothy Gale after the Witch's death

memes.label: Wishes
memes.description: The driving force of every character's journey to Oz — the specific desire each traveler hopes the Wizard will grant, and the mechanism by which the story's quests are resolved

memes.label: Witch of the North
memes.description: The good witch who greets Dorothy upon her arrival in Oz, gives her the Silver Shoes, and bestows a protective kiss that shields her throughout the journey
aliases: the Good Witch of the North

memes.label: Witch's Castle
memes.description: The yellow fortress of the Wicked Witch of the West in Winkie Country, where Dorothy is enslaved, the Witch is melted, and the Winkies are liberated

memes.label: Wizard of Oz
memes.description: The mysterious ruler of the Emerald City who is believed to be a powerful wizard but is revealed as an ordinary man from Omaha who rules through illusion and perception management

memes.label: The Wizard's Departure
memes.description: The Wizard prepares a hot-air balloon to take Dorothy back to Kansas, but as she chases Toto, the ropes break and the balloon floats away leaving Dorothy stranded in Oz

memes.label: Wolves of the Wicked Witch
memes.description: A pack of fierce, great-legged wolves commanded by the Wicked Witch of the West to attack Dorothy and her companions; all forty were slain by the Tin Woodman in a single night

memes.label: The Tin Woodman's Axe
memes.description: "The axe of the Tin Woodman, enchanted by the Wicked Witch of the East to systematically sever its owner's limbs, leading to his transformation from flesh to tin."

memes.label: Yellow Brick Road
memes.description: The road paved with yellow bricks that leads from the Munchkin Country to the Emerald City at the center of Oz.
aliases: the road to the Emerald City

memes.label: Yellow Winkie Guards
memes.description: The Winkies enslaved by the Wicked Witch of the West who are forced to guard her castle walls, patrol its corridors, and carry out her cruel orders until Dorothy liberates them
